# Dynamic Radiative Forcing

This sub-package has [`DynamicRadiativeForcing`](drf_calculator.md#pod_lca.dynamic_radiative_forcing.DynamicRadiativeForcing) class containing methods for the calcluation of dynamic radiative forcing and [`DynamicRadiativeForcingRecord`](drf_record.md#pod_lca.dynamic_radiative_forcing.DynamicRadiativeForcingRecord) class being a container and a generator for dynamic radiative forcing time series.
